memories.value: First run. Discover all active properties and their statuses. Query all specialist bots for existing findings. Produce initial portfolio briefing with available data. Establish baseline occupancy and revenue metrics.

No portfolio health baseline established yet. Will track: overall occupancy rate, average nightly rate, revenue per available night (RevPAN), guest satisfaction score (average rating), channel distribution, turnover on-time rate.

No cross-domain patterns identified yet. Will learn which specialist findings correlate — e.g., pricing drops leading to occupancy spikes, negative reviews correlating with specific turnover issues, channel sync failures preceding double-bookings.
